# CANDIDATE: MISSED_SETUP_WATCHER

**Filed:** 2026-05-22
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** watcher_proposal
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Over the last 30 days, journal entries show certain setup patterns fired >=3 times with SPY moving >0.20% in the expected direction, but Gamma did not enter due to missing triggers or filters. Capturing these as watcher proposals will allow evaluation of whether adding them as new triggers or adjusting filters improves edge capture on J's anchor days.

## Mechanism

The watcher will scan for the specific setup pattern (to be defined after mining journal/_chef-log.jsonl) and emit an observation when the pattern fires. It will not send orders; it will only record observations for later analysis. Entry trigger missing in Gamma: [to be filled after evidence collection].

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** unknown -- requires mining journal/2026-*.md and _chef-log.jsonl; sample size and selection method TBD; overfit risk high if not validated OOS.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS
5. **Failure modes:** Watcher may fire too frequently causing observation overload; may miss true setups if pattern definition too strict; may add noise if pattern not predictive.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires analysis of which days contribute to P&L if pattern added as trigger.

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>
- Journal mining script must be run and evidence compiled.
- Watcher code must pass gym validation (no false positives on known non-setup bars).
- Walk-forward analysis on held-out window must show non-negative edge contribution.
- Real-fills check on top 3 J days must show simulation vs real fill diff < ±20%.

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- low confidence due to lack of evidence; requires data mining to substantiate.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates; proposes a new watcher to mine for missed setups. Complementary to existing watchers that filter or gate.
